# B. Morvay Coaching

> Online personal training for busy professionals by Balazs Morvay, a Physical Activity and Health BSc (Hons) qualified personal trainer and sports massage therapist with 10+ years in the industry. Online coaching worldwide; in-person training and mobile sports massage in Edinburgh, Scotland. Specialist support for people on or coming off GLP-1 medications (Ozempic, Wegovy, Mounjaro): preserving muscle during weight loss and keeping the weight off afterwards.

Key facts:
- Services: online coaching (Programme £99/month, Full Coaching £200/month), in-person sessions £60/session (client home gyms or private garage gym, Edinburgh), mobile sports massage £50 per 45 minutes (Edinburgh and nearby, subject to availability), home gym equipment planning (equipment and layout advice, included with coaching)
- No contracts, full refund in the first 14 days, free 30-minute consultation
- Specialisms: weight loss and weight management, GLP-1 medication support (muscle preservation and post-medication maintenance), strength and muscle building, returning to training after a break
- Contact: morvaybalazs@gmail.com, +44 7914 390913

## Main pages

- [Home](https://www.bmorvay.com/): services, approach, Stages of Change starting points, pricing, consultation booking
- [FAQ](https://www.bmorvay.com/faq.html): qualifications, pricing, GLP-1 support, massage, contracts
- [Library](https://www.bmorvay.com/library.html): all free guides, programmes, and articles

## Free resources

- [Maintaining Weight Loss After GLP-1 Medications](https://www.bmorvay.com/blog-glp1.html): protecting muscle on the medication and the step-by-step off-ramp for coming off it
- [3-Day Full-Body Programme](https://www.bmorvay.com/training-plan.html): complete free programme with home gym swaps
- [The Home Gym That Actually Gets Used](https://www.bmorvay.com/home-gym-guide.html): equipment buying guide at £150/£400/£800 budgets
- [Protein Without the Faff](https://www.bmorvay.com/protein-guide.html): practical protein targets and food choices
- [Why Consistency Is the Wrong Goal](https://www.bmorvay.com/blog-consistency.html): durable habits over unbroken streaks
- [The Honest Truth About Rest Days](https://www.bmorvay.com/blog-rest-days.html): recovery and reading your own readiness
- [Weekly Check-In Template](https://www.bmorvay.com/check-in-template.html): simple training/sleep/energy/mood tracker
